name: messengar
description: WhatsApp CLI client for personal messaging with TypeScript

scripts.daemon:restart: npm run daemon:stop && sleep 2 && npm run daemon:start
scripts.daemon:status: if [ -f messengar-daemon.pid ]; then pid=$(cat messengar-daemon.pid); if ps -p $pid > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo '✅ Daemon is running (PID: '$pid')'; else echo '❌ Daemon is not running (stale PID file)'; rm messengar-daemon.pid; fi; else echo '❌ Daemon is not running (no PID file)'; fi
